UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's profile information, excluding sensitive authentication data which is handled by an external system.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

firstName.description: The first name of the user.

lastName.description: The last name of the user.

email.description: The primary email address of the user, used for communication and notifications.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was last updated.

Address.title: Address
Address.description: Represents a physical address associated with a user or an order, used for shipping and billing.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Address entity.

userProfileId.description: Reference to the UserProfile this address belongs to. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Address)

recipientName.description: The name of the recipient for this address.

addressLine1.description: The first line of the street address.

addressLine2.description: The second line of the street address (optional).

stateProvince.description: The state or province of the address.

postalCode.description: The postal or zip code of the address.

isShippingDefault.description: Indicates if this is the user's default shipping address.

isBillingDefault.description: Indicates if this is the user's default billing address.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the address was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the address was last updated.

Category.title: Category
Category.description: Represents a classification for products, used for navigation and filtering (e.g., Men, Footwear, Sneakers). Categories can be hierarchical.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Category entity.

description.description: A brief description of the category.

parentCategoryId.description: Reference to the parent Category, if this is a sub-category. (Relationship: Category 1:N Category)

categoryType.description: The type of category (e.g., 'Gender', 'ProductGroup', 'ProductType') to help with UI organization.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the category was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the category was last updated.

Product.title: Product
Product.description: Represents an individual footwear product available for sale in the store.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Product entity.

name.description: The name of the product (e.g., 'Vapor Max-X').

description.description: A detailed description of the product.

price.description: The current price of the product.

mainImageUrl.description: The URL of the primary image for the product.

additionalImageUrls.description: An array of URLs for additional images of the product, showcasing different views.

sku.description: Stock Keeping Unit, a unique code for the product.

categoryIds.description: References to Categories this product belongs to (e.g., 'Men', 'Footwear', 'Sneakers'). (Relationship: Product N:N Category)

specifications.description: Detailed specifications of the product, such as materials, features, or dimensions, as a descriptive text.

stockQuantity.description: The current number of units available in stock.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the product was added to the catalog.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the product information was last updated.

Cart.title: Cart
Cart.description: Represents a user's shopping cart, containing items selected for purchase.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Cart entity.

userProfileId.description: Reference to the UserProfile that owns this cart. Can be null for anonymous carts. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:1 Cart)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the cart was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the cart was last updated.

CartItem.title: CartItem
CartItem.description: Represents a single product entry within a shopping cart, including the quantity.

id.description: Unique identifier for the CartItem entity.

cartId.description: Reference to the Cart this item belongs to. (Relationship: Cart 1:N CartItem)

productId.description: Reference to the Product added to the cart. (Relationship: Product 1:N CartItem)

quantity.description: The quantity of the product in the cart.

priceAtAddition.description: The price of the product at the time it was added to the cart.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the cart item was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the cart item was last updated.

Order.title: Order
Order.description: Represents a completed transaction or purchase made by a user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Order entity.

userProfileId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who placed the order. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Order)

orderDate.description: Timestamp when the order was placed.

totalAmount.description: The total monetary amount of the order, including shipping and taxes.

status.description: The current status of the order (e.g., 'pending', 'processing', 'shipped', 'delivered', 'cancelled').

shippingAddressId.description: Reference to the Address used for shipping this order. (Relationship: Address 1:N Order)

billingAddressId.description: Reference to the Address used for billing this order. (Relationship: Address 1:N Order)

paymentConfirmationId.description: Identifier from the external payment system confirming the transaction.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the order record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the order record was last updated.

OrderItem.title: OrderItem
OrderItem.description: Represents a single product item included in a completed order.

id.description: Unique identifier for the OrderItem entity.

orderId.description: Reference to the Order this item belongs to. (Relationship: Order 1:N OrderItem)

productId.description: Reference to the Product purchased. (Relationship: Product 1:N OrderItem)

quantity.description: The quantity of the product purchased in this order item.

unitPrice.description: The price of a single unit of the product at the time of purchase.

subtotal.description: The total price for this order item (quantity * unitPrice).

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the order item was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the order item was last updated.

UserPreference.title: UserPreference
UserPreference.description: Stores user-specific preferences to power personalized recommendations.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserPreference entity.

userProfileId.description: Reference to the UserProfile these preferences belong to. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:1 UserPreference)

preferredBrands.description: An array of brand names the user prefers.

preferredColors.description: An array of color names or hex codes the user prefers for footwear.

preferredCategoryIds.description: An array of category IDs representing preferred product types or groups (e.g., Sneakers, Men's Footwear). (Relationship: Category N:N UserPreference)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the preferences were created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the preferences were last updated.

NewsletterSubscription.title: NewsletterSubscription
NewsletterSubscription.description: Represents a subscription to the store's newsletter for updates and promotions.

id.description: Unique identifier for the NewsletterSubscription entity.

email.description: The email address of the subscriber.

subscriptionDate.description: Timestamp when the subscription was made.

isConfirmed.description: Indicates if the email subscription has been confirmed (e.g., via a double opt-in link).

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the subscription record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the subscription record was last updated.

definition.description: User's personal profile. The document ID (`userId`) must match `request.auth.uid` for ownership.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user, matching Firebase Authentication UID.

definition.description: Shipping and billing addresses associated with a user. Includes denormalized 'userProfileId' matching the path 'userId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user who owns this address.

params.name: addressId
params.description: The unique ID of the address document.

definition.description: Product classification categories (e.g., Men, Footwear, Sneakers). These are publicly readable for navigation and filtering, and managed by administrators.

params.name: categoryId
params.description: The unique ID of the category.

definition.description: Individual footwear products available for sale. These are publicly readable for display, and managed by administrators.

params.name: productId
params.description: The unique ID of the product.

definition.description: The authenticated user's singleton shopping cart. The document ID is a fixed value (e.g., 'current' or 'active'). Includes denormalized 'userProfileId' matching the path 'userId' for authorization independence. Anonymous carts are handled client-side or in a separate collection if strictly needed in Firestore.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user who owns this cart.

definition.description: Individual items within an authenticated user's shopping cart. Includes denormalized 'userProfileId' and 'cartId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user who owns this cart item.

params.name: cartItemId
params.description: The unique ID of the cart item document.

definition.description: A user's placed order. Includes denormalized 'userProfileId' matching the path 'userId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user who placed this order.

params.name: orderId
params.description: The unique ID of the order document.

definition.description: Individual items within a user's order. Includes denormalized 'userProfileId' and 'orderId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user who owns this order item.

params.name: orderId
params.description: The unique ID of the parent order.

params.name: orderItemId
params.description: The unique ID of the order item document.

definition.description: User-specific preferences for personalized recommendations. The document ID is a fixed value (e.g., 'settings'). Includes denormalized 'userProfileId' matching the path 'userId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user who owns these preferences.

definition.description: Records for newsletter subscriptions. Publicly writable for new subscriptions, but read/update/delete access is restricted to administrators.

params.name: subscriptionId
params.description: The unique ID of the newsletter subscription.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore structure is designed following the core principles of Authorization Independence, Structural Segregation, and DBAC. For user-specific data, a hierarchical path structure centered around `/users/{userId}` is utilized, which inherently provides path-based ownership. 

**Authorization Independence (CRITICAL):**
To eliminate the need for `get()` calls in security rules and enable atomic operations, crucial authorization context is denormalized directly into relevant documents. For all subcollections under `/users/{userId}/...` (e.g., `addresses`, `cart/items`, `orders`, `orders/{orderId}/items`, `preferences`), the `userProfileId` field is included in the document data. This allows security rules to directly verify `resource.data.userProfileId == request.auth.uid` without needing to inspect parent documents, ensuring that a document's ownership is self-contained and verifiable.

**Structural Segregation (Homogeneous Security Posture):**
Collections are segregated based on their security posture. Publicly accessible and globally managed entities like `Category` and `Product` reside in top-level collections (`/categories`, `/products`) accessible to all authenticated or unauthenticated users for read operations. User-owned, private data (e.g., `UserProfile`, `Address`, `Cart`, `Order`, `UserPreference`) are nested under `/users/{userId}`, ensuring that all documents within these subcollections share the same ownership-based security requirements. The `NewsletterSubscription` collection is designed for public `create` access (anyone can subscribe) but restricted `read/update/delete` access (admin-only), reflecting a distinct security posture.

**QAPs (Rules are not Filters):**
1.  **Public Data (`/categories`, `/products`):** These collections are designed to be globally readable. Security rules will simply allow `list: true`, meaning any client can request and receive all documents. The structure avoids mixing public and private data, ensuring that `list` operations always return the full, intended set of data without needing to filter on the client or rely on inefficient server-side filtering via rules.
2.  **User-Owned Data (`/users/{userId}/addresses`, `/users/{userId}/cart/items`, `/users/{userId}/orders`, `/users/{userId}/orders/{orderId}/items`):** The hierarchical path ensures that `list` operations are inherently scoped to a specific `userId`. Security rules will enforce `allow list: if request.auth.uid == userId;`, where `userId` is the path wildcard. This guarantees that when a user requests a list of their addresses or orders, the database operation is secure and efficient, returning only data owned by the authenticated user, thus supporting QAPs by design.

**DBAC (No Custom Claims):**
While not explicitly requested in the path structure for the provided entities, an implicit `roles_admin/{uid}` collection (or similar) would be used for database-backed access control for managing `Category`, `Product`, and `NewsletterSubscription` entities. This adheres to the principle of storing roles within the database rather than relying on custom claims.
